title: AGV agv_tourmodular_street-tc-2

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Reinforced Polymer (CFRP) Shell with ABS Impact Liner
specs.strap_type: Quick-Release Magnetic Buckle with Double D-Ring

technical_analysis: The AGV agv_tourmodular_street-tc-2 utilizes a proprietary Carbon Fiber Reinforced Polymer (CFRP) shell architecture that significantly reduces overall mass without compromising structural rigidity. This material choice allows for thinner impact zones while maintaining the necessary stiffness to distribute kinetic energy effectively during an impact event, adhering strictly to ECE 22.06 standards. The internal EPS liner is engineered with variable density foam mapping, providing superior energy absorption specifically tailored to the Intermediate Oval head shape, ensuring optimal protection across the temple and occipital regions.
marketing_description: Experience the perfect blend of touring comfort and street agility with the AGV agv_tourmodular_street-tc-2. Designed for the modern rider who demands versatility, this helmet features a sleek, aerodynamic profile that cuts through the wind while offering the convenience of a modular flip-up mechanism. The lightweight CFRP construction ensures you stay cool on long rides without sacrificing the premium safety standards AGV is renowned for.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the AGV agv_tourmodular_street-tc-2: a lightweight, ECE 22.06 certified modular helmet featuring carbon fiber technology and superior ventilation for ultimate touring performance.
